description: Close is a sales communication platform that helps teams manage leads, track calls, emails, and automate outreach.
self_serve: Yes – free trial and self‑service onboarding
api_surface: RESTful API with CRUD endpoints for leads, contacts, calls, emails, notes, tasks, and more; supports pagination, filtering, and webhooks
buildability: High – comprehensive REST API, SDKs for Node.js, Python, Ruby, and detailed documentation
main_blocker: Rate limiting (100 requests/minute) and OAuth 2.0 flow complexity
